sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59479" key="kouro/sunos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κουρό-σῠνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n59479.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">youthful</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θρίξ</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1458.tlg001:6:156" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.156</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodorid.</author></bibl>, with play on <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κούριμος</foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shorn</tr_>); wrongly expld. as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ὑπὲρ τῆς κουρᾶς θυόμενον</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
